header.title: Survey health and operations
header.description: Track onboarding workload, survey lifecycle volume, participation health, and privileged activity entry points.

pendingApprovals.title: Pending approvals
pendingApprovals.description: Latest student accounts waiting for review.
pendingApprovals.emptyDescription: All currently onboarded students have already been reviewed.

lifecycle.title: Lifecycle overview
lifecycle.description: Counts from active survey lifecycle and visibility state.

topResponses.title: Top response volume
topResponses.descriptionAll: Surveys with the highest response count in the selected date window.
topResponses.descriptionDepartment: System-wide response volume for the selected date window; department-specific participation appears below.
topResponses.emptyDescription: Result activity will appear here after surveys start collecting responses.

participation.title: Participation health
participation.description: Opened and submitted counts from recipient tracking.

attention.title: Surveys needing attention
attention.description: Open surveys with remaining recipients, sorted by lowest response rate.
attention.emptyDescription: Open surveys with incomplete participation will appear here.

header.title: Survey overview
header.description: Check what is open now, what is coming next, and which surveys are close to their deadline.

available.title: Available now
available.description: Open surveys you can access immediately.
available.empty: No surveys are open right now.

closingSoon.title: Closing soon
closingSoon.description: Open surveys ordered by nearest deadline.
closingSoon.empty: No urgent survey deadlines right now.

upcoming.title: Upcoming surveys
upcoming.description: Surveys scheduled but not open yet.

header.title: Results overview
header.description: Review survey activity that is visible within your department scope and jump directly into the most active result sets.

mostActive.title: Most active surveys
mostActive.description: Surveys ordered by current response volume.
mostActive.empty: No survey results are available yet.

openSurveys.title: Open surveys
openSurveys.description: Result entries that are still collecting responses.
openSurveys.label: survey runs still open

coverage.title: Coverage
coverage.description: Average response count across all visible surveys.
coverage.label: responses per survey

header.manageDescription: Review survey setup, monitor recipient activity, and control lifecycle transitions from one operational page.
header.createDescription: Create a survey draft with clear information, schedule, audience, and question structure before publishing.

lifecycleHelp.new: New surveys start as drafts. Configure survey information, schedule, audience, and questions before publishing.
lifecycleHelp.draft: Draft surveys remain editable. Publish only when the dates, audience, and question set are complete.
lifecycleHelp.published: Published surveys follow their schedule. Only visibility changes and explicit closure are available.
lifecycleHelp.closed: Closed surveys are read-only. Archive them when they should move into record-keeping mode.
lifecycleHelp.archived: Archived surveys remain read-only historical records.

lifecycleActions.title: Lifecycle actions
lifecycleActions.description: Only show publish, close, archive, and visibility actions when the current lifecycle allows them.

confirm.publish: Publish "{{title}}" and assign it to the configured recipients.
confirm.close: Close "{{title}}" now and stop collecting responses immediately.
confirm.archive: Archive "{{title}}" as a historical record. It will remain read-only.
confirm.show: Make "{{title}}" visible again for eligible recipients.
confirm.hide: Hide "{{title}}" from recipients without changing its lifecycle state.

information.title: Survey information
information.description: Keep the survey title and description readable for admins who manage many campaigns in parallel.

templates.help: Replace mode copies the selected template into this draft. It overwrites current title, description, audience, and questions, and later template changes will not sync into this survey.
templates.confirmDescription: This will overwrite the current draft title, description, audience, and question list. The template will be copied into this draft and will not stay linked for future changes.

fields.title: Title
fields.descriptionHelp: This is used in admin search and should help distinguish surveys quickly.

schedule.title: Schedule
schedule.description: Runtime status is derived from lifecycle state and this date window.

audience.title: Audience / recipients
audience.description: Recipient configuration should describe who receives the survey without exposing backend-shaped IDs.
audience.departmentUnavailable: Department lookup is unavailable right now. This selection will remain empty until departments can be loaded.
audience.locked: Recipient settings are locked after publication or once responses exist.

questions.title: Questions
questions.description: This phase keeps the current editor model but organizes it into a cleaner operational section.
questions.emptyDescription: Add at least one question before saving or publishing this survey.
questions.locked: Questions are locked after publication or once responses exist.
questions.bankHelp: Question-bank items are copied into the draft. Later edits or archives in the question bank do not change this survey.

recipientActivity.title: Recipient activity
recipientActivity.description: These recipient counts and pending participants help explain real survey performance, not just configuration state.
recipientActivity.emptyDescription: Everyone assigned to this survey has already submitted, or the survey has not assigned recipients yet.

feedback.templateApplied: Applied template "{{name}}" in replace mode. Template questions were copied into this draft.
feedback.draftCreated: Survey draft created. Review it and publish when ready.

header.title: Survey management
header.description: Operate surveys as managed campaigns with clear lifecycle state, runtime availability, visibility, recipient scope, and response activity.

empty.title: No matching surveys
empty.description: Adjust the filters, date window, or search terms to find the survey campaign you need.

confirm.publish: Publish "{{title}}" and assign it to recipients based on its audience settings.
confirm.close: Close "{{title}}" now and stop any further responses regardless of its original end date.
confirm.archive: Archive "{{title}}" as a historical record. Archived surveys stay read-only.
confirm.show: Make "{{title}}" visible again for its eligible recipients.
confirm.hide: Hide "{{title}}" from recipients without changing its lifecycle state.

header.title: User account management
header.description: Search, review, update profile details, and activate or deactivate accounts without implying role reassignment.

filters.search: Search by name, email, student code, or lecturer code

empty.title: No matching users
empty.description: Adjust role tabs, search, or filters to find the account records you need.

edit.title: Edit basic info
edit.description: Update core user information without changing role or survey permissions.

header.title: Pending student approvals
header.description: Review onboarding requests as a queue with searchable student context, reusable review notes, and explicit approve or reject decisions.

filters.search: Search by name, email, or student code

empty.title: No pending students in this queue view
empty.description: Adjust the search or filters to find the onboarding request you need.

detail.title: Review detail
detail.description: Approve or reject without leaving the onboarding queue. Rejection reason remains required.

documents.title: Submitted documents
documents.description: Documents are fetched from the backend and rendered inline when previewable.

previous.title: Previous review context
previous.description: This appears when the student has been previously rejected and resubmitted.

decision.title: Review decision
decision.description: Provide the rejection reason before rejecting. Notes are optional for both decisions.
decision.rejectionPlaceholder: Required if you reject this onboarding request
decision.notesPlaceholder: Optional notes recorded with the review decision

confirm.approveDescription: Approve {{name}} and activate this onboarding request.
confirm.rejectDescription: Reject {{name}}. A rejection reason will be sent back through the existing resubmission flow.

header.title: Audit logs
header.description: Review privileged actions, lifecycle changes, onboarding decisions, and account operations.

empty.title: No audit logs found
empty.description: Adjust filters to inspect privileged activity.

header.title: Question bank
header.description: Create reusable question assets that can be copied into draft surveys and survey templates.

form.description: Question-bank entries are reusable source questions. Archiving keeps old survey copies intact.
form.copyHelp: Adding a bank question to a survey or template copies its current text and type. Later edits here affect future use only.

list.title: Reusable questions
list.description: Search and manage active or archived question-bank entries.

empty.title: No matching question-bank entries
empty.description: Adjust search, type, state, or category filters.

header.title: Survey templates
header.description: Create reusable survey structures that can initialize draft surveys with suggested copy, audience, and questions.

form.description: Template questions can be copied from the question bank or written specifically for the template.
form.archivedNotice: This template is archived. Saving edits keeps it archived; use Restore when it should become available for survey drafts again.
form.bankCopyHelp: Questions added from the bank are copied into the template. Later question-bank edits or archives do not change existing templates.
form.bankLimitHelp: Showing first {{shown}} active bank questions in this picker; use Question Bank search to manage the full {{total}}.

list.title: Templates
list.description: Apply these templates from the survey draft editor.

empty.title: No matching templates
empty.description: Adjust search or state filters to find reusable survey templates.
